title: Dense Sour Brazilian Cookie Casserole
description: A sour and dense Brazilian dish featuring cookies and tadka, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This Mediterranean-friendly recipe is made in a cazuela.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the crushed cookies, melted butter, and tadka spice blend.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sour cream, eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shredded parmesan cheese to the sour cream mixture and stir until combined.
Add the cookie mixture to the sour cream mixture and stir until a dense dough forms.
Transfer the dough to a cazuela and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole for 35 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
